## Describe the bug
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Run `sonar ...`
2. ...

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior
What actually happened. Include terminal output if possible.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. macOS 15.1, Ubuntu 24.04]
- sonar version: [e.g. v0.1.0, output of `sonar --version`]
- Docker version (if relevant):
